description: Style Notedkny Delicious Night, for women, comes in a purple apple shaped flacon. It sparks to life with a flash of pulsating light and energy.Product DetailsOpening with a cocktail of frozen pomelo, stirred with crushed ginger, silky purple freesia adds a flash of light and energy as a bouquet of night blooming orchids, satin jasmine petals and purple iris uncovers the soul of the scentCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
